title: Egghead Falls Toward Escape
description: On pages 9–11, this part focuses on Unknown person #7, Luffy, Unknown person #8, Unknown person #9, Giants, Bonney as The Straw Hats, Bonney, the giants, and the Vegapunk broadcast push Egghead toward its escape point while the world learns that the One Piece will decide the fate of the era.
scene: The Straw Hats, Bonney, the giants, and the Vegapunk broadcast push Egghead toward its escape point while the world learns that the One Piece will decide the fate of the era.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There will be a reckoning on the day those answers come.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You must be on guard to protect yourselves!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I have faith in humanity's capacity for wisdom!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: BZZ is a great way to get a little bit of a bit of money. It is a good thing to be a good deal.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And it's been two years since Whitebeard's death!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...there are certain individuals who can't be oppressed!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: DA HA HA!! WE REALLY SENT HIM FLYING, BONNEY!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We're gonna die!! We're gonna fall and die!! Someone save us!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: A coincidence? Or did Roger set this all in motion?

summary: This part advances the Egghead Escape through 23 cleaned dialogue beats, emphasizing the core conflict, character stakes, and transition into the next movement of the story.
